TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Darrell_Arthur, title = Darrell_Arthur, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Darrell_Arthur} }

S.FORM: Darrell Arthur Darrell Arthur hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1988, byacing te 3 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Texas, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 107 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2008 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Orleans Hornets. maki pqwasan biru, Arthur rasuw South Oak Cliff pqwasan biru,maki 2005 ru 2006 magal Texas 4A te qutux.sazing kawas qani ga, tournament's na MVP. qnxan na pqwasan biru maki hopa pqwasan biru payat 年級, Arthur maki 2006 kawas McDonald's kwara Amerika blaq punro na squilq ru kwara Amerika Parade magal te cyugal. pincyogan nya Memphis Grizzlies 孟菲斯灰熊隊 (2008–2013) maki 2008 kawas,Arthur NBA pspung te 27 New Orleans Hornets 選中,suruw lga, musa Portland Trail Blazers yugiy pila.suruw lga,musa Houston Rockets yugiy te 25 Nicolas Batum magal pspung.suruw lga,Arthur Houston Rockets tehok Memphis Grizzlies yugiy te 28 Donté Greene magal pspung. 2008 kawas 9 byacing 3 ryax,Arthur ru rangi (Mario Chalmers馬里奧·查默斯) Kansas Jayhawks , zyaw na yaqeh iyu ,sa t'aring NBA Training Camp(NBA 新秀訓練營中) hmtuy la. maki ska bengi sazing spung lga,shat ga mong qlapa beh tbaziy quo na mise zi ngasal qasa sokan kian ro na baku,ana yasa ga ini ktan qaya ru ini an hokuso/pozi. maki telivi,trang NBA Michael Beasley maki 'byan quo soybay uzi,ini mshriq NBA 訓練營. suruw lga,Beasley sangka' qasa zyaw phogun 50000美元 pila, Arthur kmal ini maniq 大麻.ini musa mqbaq phogun 20000美元 pila. 2012 kawas 6 byacing 29 ryax, Grizzlies biqiy Arthur hiya 成為 受限制 na punro squilq. Denver Nuggets 丹佛掘金隊 (2013–2018) 2013 kawas 6 byacing 27 ryax, Arthur ru te 55 (Denver Nuggets新秀喬弗里·洛弗涅) msqun musa Denver Nuggets yugiy Kosta Koufos .2014 kawas 6 byacing 23 ryax,hiya sangka' 2014-2015 kawas pspung na punro squilq. 2015 kawas 8 byacing 7 ryax, Arthur Denver Nuggets pinkyalan / keyak ppkal ta lozi.2016 kawas 3 byacing 31 ryax,24 分 magal blaq pincyogan na qnxan. 2016 kawas 7 byacing 9 ryax,Arthur ru Nuggets pinkyalan / keyak ppkal ta lozi. 2018 kawas 7 byacing 13 ryax,Arthur ru Kenneth Faried ,magal qutux mklahang kawas 2019 taring spyang pspung ginyagan ru 2020 kawas te sazing spyang pspung ginyagan hiya msqun pinkyalan Brooklyn Nets yugiy Isaiah Whitehead . babaw na pitu ryax, Arthur musa Phoenix Suns yugiy Jared Dudley ru qutux na 2021 te sazing 輪 . 2018 kawas 10 byacing 15 ryax, Arthur wal laxan Suns qasa la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Darrell Arthur Darrell Arthur hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1988, byacing te 3 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Texas, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 107 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2008 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Orleans Hornets. maki pqwasan biru, Arthur rasuw South Oak Cliff pqwasan biru,maki 2005 ru 2006 magal Texas 4A te qutux.sazing kawas qani ga, tournament's na MVP. qnxan na pqwasan biru maki hopa pqwasan biru payat 年級, Arthur maki 2006 kawas McDonald's kwara Amerika blaq punro na squilq ru kwara Amerika Parade magal te cyugal. pincyogan nya Memphis Grizzlies 孟菲斯灰熊隊 (2008–2013) maki 2008 kawas,Arthur NBA pspung te 27 New Orleans Hornets 選中,suruw lga, musa Portland Trail Blazers yugiy pila.suruw lga,musa Houston Rockets yugiy te 25 Nicolas Batum magal pspung.suruw lga,Arthur Houston Rockets tehok Memphis Grizzlies yugiy te 28 Donté Greene magal pspung. 2008 kawas 9 byacing 3 ryax,Arthur ru rangi (Mario Chalmers馬里奧·查默斯) Kansas Jayhawks , zyaw na yaqeh iyu ,sa t'aring NBA Training Camp(NBA 新秀訓練營中) hmtuy la. maki ska bengi sazing spung lga,shat ga mong qlapa beh tbaziy quo na mise zi ngasal qasa sokan kian ro na baku,ana yasa ga ini ktan qaya ru ini an hokuso/pozi. maki telivi,trang NBA Michael Beasley maki 'byan quo soybay uzi,ini mshriq NBA 訓練營. suruw lga,Beasley sangka' qasa zyaw phogun 50000美元 pila, Arthur kmal ini maniq 大麻.ini musa mqbaq phogun 20000美元 pila. 2012 kawas 6 byacing 29 ryax, Grizzlies biqiy Arthur hiya 成為 受限制 na punro squilq. Denver Nuggets 丹佛掘金隊 (2013–2018) 2013 kawas 6 byacing 27 ryax, Arthur ru te 55 (Denver Nuggets新秀喬弗里·洛弗涅) msqun musa Denver Nuggets yugiy Kosta Koufos .2014 kawas 6 byacing 23 ryax,hiya sangka' 2014-2015 kawas pspung na punro squilq. 2015 kawas 8 byacing 7 ryax, Arthur Denver Nuggets pinkyalan / keyak ppkal ta lozi.2016 kawas 3 byacing 31 ryax,24 分 magal blaq pincyogan na qnxan. 2016 kawas 7 byacing 9 ryax,Arthur ru Nuggets pinkyalan / keyak ppkal ta lozi. 2018 kawas 7 byacing 13 ryax,Arthur ru Kenneth Faried ,magal qutux mklahang kawas 2019 taring spyang pspung ginyagan ru 2020 kawas te sazing spyang pspung ginyagan hiya msqun pinkyalan Brooklyn Nets yugiy Isaiah Whitehead . babaw na pitu ryax, Arthur musa Phoenix Suns yugiy Jared Dudley ru qutux na 2021 te sazing 輪 . 2018 kawas 10 byacing 15 ryax, Arthur wal laxan Suns qasa la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *arrell artħur *arrell artħur ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa texas~ɕ, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu orleans~ɕ ħornets~ɕ. maki pqwas~ɕan βiru, artħur ras~ɕuw s~ɕoutħ oak ʦ~ʨli** pqwas~ɕan βiru,maki **** ru **** maɣal texas~ɕ *a te qutux.s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ qani ɣa, tournamentʔs~ɕ na m*p. qnxan na pqwas~ɕan βiru maki ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru pajat **, artħur maki **** kawas~ɕ mʦ~ʨ*onal*ʔs~ɕ kwara amerika βlaq punro na s~ɕquilq ru kwara amerika para*e maɣal te ʦ~ʨjuɣal. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja mempħis~ɕ ɣrizzlies~ɕ ****** (*********) maki **** kawas~ɕ,artħur nβa ps~ɕpuŋ te ** new orleans~ɕ ħornets~ɕ **,s~ɕuruw lɣa, mus~ɕa portlan* trail βlazers~ɕ juɣij pila.s~ɕuruw lɣa,mus~ɕa ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ juɣij te ** niʦ~ʨolas~ɕ βatum maɣal ps~ɕpuŋ.s~ɕuruw lɣa,artħur ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ teħok mempħis~ɕ ɣrizzlies~ɕ juɣij te ** *ont* ɣreene maɣal ps~ɕpuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,artħur ru raŋi (mario ʦ~ʨħalmers~ɕ*******) kans~ɕas~ɕ *ajħawks~ɕ , zjaw na jaqeħ iju ,s~ɕa tʔariŋ nβa trainiŋ ʦ~ʨamp(nβa ******) ħmtuj la. maki s~ɕka βeŋi s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕpuŋ lɣa,s~ɕħat ɣa moŋ qlapa βeħ tβazij quo na mis~ɕe zi ŋas~ɕal qas~ɕa s~ɕokan kian ro na βaku,ana jas~ɕa ɣa ini ktan qaja ru ini an ħokus~ɕo/pozi. maki teli*i,traŋ nβa miʦ~ʨħael βeas~ɕlej maki ʔβjan quo s~ɕojβaj uzi,ini ms~ɕħriq nβa ***. s~ɕuruw lɣa,βeas~ɕlej s~ɕaŋkaʔ qas~ɕa zjaw pħoɣun ******* pila, artħur kmal ini maniq **.ini mus~ɕa mqβaq pħoɣun ******* pila. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, ɣrizzlies~ɕ βiqij artħur ħija ** *** na punro s~ɕquilq. *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ ***** (*********) **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, artħur ru te ** (*en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ*********) ms~ɕqun mus~ɕa *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ juɣij kos~ɕta kou*os~ɕ .**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,ħija s~ɕaŋkaʔ ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ na punro s~ɕquilq. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax, artħur *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ pinkjalan / kejak ppkal ta lozi.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,** * maɣal βlaq pinʦ~ʨjoɣan na qnxan. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,artħur ru nuɣɣets~ɕ pinkjalan / kejak ppkal ta lozi. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,artħur ru kennetħ *arie* ,maɣal qutux mklaħaŋ kawas~ɕ **** tariŋ s~ɕpjaŋ ps~ɕpuŋ ɣinjaɣan ru **** kawas~ɕ te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕpjaŋ ps~ɕpuŋ ɣinjaɣan ħija ms~ɕqun pinkjalan βrookljn nets~ɕ juɣij is~ɕaiaħ wħiteħea* . βaβaw na pitu rjax, artħur mus~ɕa pħoenix s~ɕuns~ɕ juɣij *are* *u*lej ru qutux na **** te s~ɕaziŋ * . **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, artħur wal laxan s~ɕuns~ɕ qas~ɕa la. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
